name: codex-readcov
description: Codex skill for measuring transcript read coverage with codex-readcov.

interface.longDescription: Codex Readcov provides workflow guidance for orchestrator sessions that use codex-readcov to inspect transcript read coverage, compare subagent deltas, and compose path lists with Unix tools.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $codex-readcov to inspect transcript read coverage for a Codex subagent.
